evidence: EVM IR permits Unit entrypoint returns and rejects Unit let bindings through lowerStatement diagnostics.

Bool literals, predicates, ABI parameters, return values, scalar storage, storage-map keys/values, storage-array values, event data fields, and indexed event topics lower to Yul 0/1 words; EvmTypedStorageProbe validates Bool scalar storage and Bool fixed storage arrays, EvmTypedMapProbe validates Bool storage maps plus calldata guards, and EventProbe validates Bool event data/topic encoding plus malformed Bool calldata rejection.

U32 values and ABI parameters lower as EVM words with dispatcher range guards; scalar U32 storage is accepted by validateState, EvmTypedStorageProbe validates U32 fixed storage arrays, EvmTypedMapProbe validates U32 storage maps plus U32 calldata range guards, and EventProbe validates U32 event data/topic encoding plus malformed U32 calldata rejection.

U64 values and ABI parameters lower as EVM words; Counter IR covers scalar U64 storage and return values, and EvmExpressionProbe validates U64 arithmetic, bitwise, predicate, local, literal, and return expressions.

EvmHashProbe validates Hash as a one-word EVM ABI/storage value, including Hash params, Hash returns, Hash locals, and scalar Hash storage; EvmAbiAggregateProbe validates Hash leaves inside flat ABI-facing structs and fixed arrays as Solidity `bytes32` words; EvmTypedMapProbe validates Hash storage map keys and values; EventProbe validates Hash event data fields and indexed event topics.

EvmStorageArrayProbe validates U64 fixed storage arrays and storage-backed fixed-array ABI returns from storage element reads; EvmTypedStorageProbe validates U32, Bool, and Hash fixed storage arrays; EvmArrayValueProbe validates immutable and mutable local fixed-array values over U64, U32, Bool, and Hash elements with static and dynamic indexes, including element assignment, whole-local assignment, numeric compound assignment, static and dynamic nested scalar local fixed-array reads, static and dynamic nested scalar leaf assignment/compound assignment, and nested whole-local assignment with RHS snapshotting; EvmStructArrayValueProbe validates local fixed arrays and nested local fixed arrays of flat structs with static/dynamic field reads, mutable field updates, nested field assignment/compound assignment, whole-local assignment, and nested whole-local assignment with RHS snapshotting; EvmAbiAggregateProbe validates flat static fixed-array ABI parameters/returns over U64/U32/Hash leaves, nested scalar fixed-array ABI parameters/returns, and fixed arrays of flat structs flattened to ABI words; EvmStorageStructProbe validates storage-backed fixed-array-of-flat-struct ABI returns from storage field reads; EventProbe validates local and storage-backed scalar fixed-array and fixed-array-of-flat-struct event data, nested fixed-array event data with scalar or flat-struct leaves, and indexed topic hashing from nested fixed-array local values with scalar or flat-struct leaves, storage array reads, and storage array struct field reads; EvmCrosscallProbe validates nested fixed-array typed crosscall arguments and direct entrypoint returns with scalar or flat-struct leaves across normal, value-bearing, static, and delegate modes; diagnostics reject immutable element assignment, static out-of-bounds literals, zero-length ABI arrays, nested local arrays with unsupported aggregate/non-flat leaves, nested crosscall fixed arrays with non-flat struct leaves, and unsupported element shapes.

EvmStructValueProbe validates flat immutable and mutable local struct values over U64, U32, Bool, and Hash fields, including field assignment, whole-local assignment, and numeric compound assignment; EvmStructArrayValueProbe validates flat struct elements inside local fixed arrays and nested local fixed arrays over U64, U32, Bool, and Hash fields, including whole local assignment from local arrays and self-referential array literals; EvmAbiAggregateProbe validates flat ABI-facing struct parameters/returns, including Hash/bytes32 field structs, and fixed arrays of flat structs in ABI-facing parameters/returns; EvmStorageStructProbe validates flat scalar storage structs, whole scalar storage struct reads/writes, fixed storage arrays of flat structs, and storage-backed fixed-array-of-flat-struct ABI returns; EventProbe validates flat storage struct event data/topic hashing from scalar storage reads and fixed storage arrays of flat structs, plus nested fixed-array event data whose leaves are flat structs; EvmCrosscallProbe validates flat structs as direct values, fixed-array elements, and nested fixed-array leaves in typed crosscall arguments/returns; diagnostics reject immutable field assignment, nested fields, and unsupported struct field shapes.

EVM IR lowers scalar Bool/U32/U64/Hash state to direct slot-based sload/sstore and lowers flat scalar storage structs as one slot per field with whole-struct read/write expansion; EvmTypedStorageProbe validates Bool scalar storage and EvmStorageStructProbe validates flat scalar storage structs; diagnostics reject unsupported scalar types.

EvmMapProbe validates Map<U64, U64, N> storage via Solidity-style keccak256(key, slot) mapping slots and nested storage paths formed from consecutive mapKey segments; EvmTypedMapProbe validates word key/value maps over U32, Bool, and Hash plus U32 nested mapKey storage paths; diagnostics reject non-word map key/value shapes.

EvmStorageArrayProbe validates U64 fixed storage arrays as contiguous EVM storage slots with runtime bounds checks; EvmTypedStorageProbe validates U32, Bool, and Hash fixed storage arrays as contiguous EVM storage slots with runtime bounds checks; EvmStorageStructProbe validates fixed storage arrays of flat structs as contiguous field-expanded slots with runtime bounds checks; diagnostics reject unsupported array element types.
EvmExpressionProbe validates U32 literals in arithmetic, bitwise, cast, and assertion expressions.
EvmExpressionProbe validates U64 literals in arithmetic, bitwise, predicate, and assertion expressions.
EvmExpressionProbe validates Bool literals in predicate equality/inequality and assertion expressions.
EvmHashProbe validates four-limb Hash literals packed into one EVM bytes32 word.
ContextProbe lowers userId context reads to Yul caller() and Foundry verifies a vm.prank sender.
ContextProbe lowers contractId context reads to Yul address() and Foundry verifies the etched runtime address.
ContextProbe lowers checkpointId context reads to Yul number() and Foundry verifies a vm.roll block number.
ContextProbe lowers timestamp context reads to Yul timestamp() and Foundry verifies a vm.warp timestamp.
ContextProbe lowers chainId context reads to Yul chainid() and Foundry verifies a vm.chainId chain id.
ContextProbe lowers gasPrice context reads to Yul gasprice() and Foundry verifies a vm.txGasPrice gas price.
ContextProbe lowers gasLeft context reads to Yul gasleft() and Foundry verifies a non-zero gas left value.
ContextProbe lowers baseFee context reads to Yul basefee() and Foundry verifies a vm.fee base fee.
ContextProbe lowers prevRandao context reads to Yul prevrandao() and Foundry verifies a vm.prevrandao random value.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage addition compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage subtraction compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage multiplication compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage division compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage modulo compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage bitwise-and compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage bitwise-or compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage bitwise-xor compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage shift-left compound assignment with EVM shl operand ordering; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage shift-right compound assignment with EVM shr operand ordering; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmExpressionProbe validates U32/U64/Bool literal lowering through arithmetic, bitwise, predicate, cast, and assertion expressions; EvmHashProbe validates Hash literal packing.
EvmExpressionProbe validates local identifier lowering through immutable local bindings consumed by arithmetic, bitwise, predicate, cast, and return expressions.

EvmArrayValueProbe validates fixed-array literals as immutable and mutable local fixed-array initializers, nested scalar local fixed-array initializers, whole-local assignment values, nested whole-local assignment values with RHS snapshotting, and direct literal-index sources for U64, U32, Bool, and Hash values; EvmStructArrayValueProbe validates array literals of flat struct values as local fixed-array and nested fixed-array initializers plus whole-local assignment values with RHS snapshotting; EvmAbiAggregateProbe validates flat and nested fixed-array return data from local aggregate values and literals; EvmStorageArrayProbe and EvmStorageStructProbe validate array literals whose element words come from storage reads as ABI returns; standalone array values remain explicit diagnostics.

EvmArrayValueProbe validates local fixed-array static and dynamic index reads, static and dynamic nested local fixed-array leaf reads, direct fixed-array literal static and dynamic index reads, mutable local element assignment targets, static and dynamic nested mutable leaf assignment targets, and numeric element compound assignment targets; EvmStructArrayValueProbe validates arrayGet feeding struct field reads/writes over static and dynamic local indexes, including nested local fixed-array paths whose leaves are flat structs; dynamic local indexes lower to switch/helper-based runtime bounds checks and diagnostics reject static out-of-bounds indexes.

EvmStructValueProbe validates struct literals as immutable and mutable local struct initializers and direct field-access sources; EvmStructArrayValueProbe validates struct literals as local fixed-array elements; EvmAbiAggregateProbe validates struct return data from struct literals; standalone struct values remain explicit diagnostics.

EvmStructValueProbe validates field access over immutable/mutable local struct values, direct struct literals, mutable local field assignment targets, and numeric field compound assignment targets; EvmStructArrayValueProbe validates field access over arrayGet(local struct array, index) and nested arrayGet paths with static and dynamic indexes plus assignment and compound assignment targets; diagnostics reject non-struct bases and unsupported field shapes.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 and U32 addition expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 and U32 subtraction expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 and U32 multiplication expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 and U32 division expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 and U32 modulo expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 exponentiation lowering to Yul exp through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 and U32 bitwise-and expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 and U32 bitwise-or expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 and U32 bitwise-xor expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 and U32 shift-left expressions with EVM shl operand ordering through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 and U32 shift-right expressions with EVM shr operand ordering through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates supported U32/U64/Bool casts as pass-through word expressions, including U32/Bool calldata guards before cast use.
EvmExpressionProbe validates U64 and Bool equality predicates through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates U64 and Bool inequality predicates through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates U64 less-than predicates through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates U64 less-or-equal predicates through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates U64 greater-than predicates through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates U64 greater-or-equal predicates through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates boolean conjunction expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates boolean disjunction expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates boolean negation expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmHashProbe validates dynamic four-limb Hash construction with Yul shl/or packing.
EvmHashProbe validates crypto.hash as keccak256 over one 32-byte Hash word.
EvmHashProbe validates crypto.hash_two_to_one as keccak256 over two contiguous 32-byte Hash words.
ContextProbe validates nativeValue lowering to Yul callvalue(), metadata capability value.native, and Foundry value-bearing calls.

EvmCrosscallProbe validates crosscallInvoke lowering to arity-specific Yul call helpers with selector packing, word arguments, call failure reverts, short-return reverts, and one-word return decoding.

EvmCrosscallProbe validates crosscallInvokeTyped lowering for Bool, U32, and Hash scalar words, flat struct/scalar fixed-array/fixed-array-of-flat-struct/nested-fixed-array-with-scalar-or-flat-struct-leaf ABI-word arguments, plus direct entrypoint returns of flat struct/scalar fixed-array/fixed-array-of-flat-struct/nested-fixed-array-with-scalar-or-flat-struct-leaf aggregate return data, with typed helper names, ABI input validation, multi-word return-data range guards, golden Yul, metadata entrypoints, and Foundry runtime checks.

EvmCrosscallProbe validates value-bearing typed crosscalls by forwarding nativeValue through value-specific Yul call helpers, including scalar returns, flat struct/scalar fixed-array/fixed-array-of-flat-struct/nested-fixed-array-with-scalar-or-flat-struct-leaf aggregate entrypoint returns, flat aggregate and nested scalar/flat-struct aggregate argument flattening, golden Yul, metadata entrypoints/capabilities, solc bytecode, Foundry callee msg.value/balance effects, aggregate Bool/U32 invalid return guards, and malformed value/return/non-flat-struct-leaf diagnostics.

EvmCrosscallProbe validates typed staticcall lowering through value-free Yul staticcall helpers, including scalar returns, flat struct/scalar fixed-array/fixed-array-of-flat-struct/nested-fixed-array-with-scalar-or-flat-struct-leaf aggregate entrypoint returns, golden Yul, metadata entrypoints/capabilities, solc bytecode, Foundry U64 read-only return behavior, Bool/U32/Hash static typed returns, flat aggregate and nested scalar/flat-struct aggregate argument flattening, Bool/U32 invalid return guards across scalar and aggregate returns, static-context state-write failure, and malformed non-flat-struct-leaf diagnostics.

EvmCrosscallProbe validates typed delegatecall lowering through value-free Yul delegatecall helpers, including scalar returns, flat struct/scalar fixed-array/fixed-array-of-flat-struct/nested-fixed-array-with-scalar-or-flat-struct-leaf aggregate entrypoint returns, golden Yul, metadata entrypoints/capabilities, solc bytecode, Foundry caller-storage read/write behavior, Bool/U32/Hash delegate typed returns, flat aggregate and nested scalar/flat-struct aggregate argument flattening, Bool/U32 invalid return guards across scalar and aggregate returns, and malformed non-flat-struct-leaf diagnostics.

EvmCrosscallProbe validates contract creation lowering to a Yul helper that writes fixed init-code hex to memory, calls create(value, offset, length), reverts on zero address, returns the deployed address word, records crosscall.invoke metadata, matches golden Yul, compiles with solc, and deploys/calls a runtime contract through Foundry.

EvmCrosscallProbe validates deterministic contract creation lowering to a Yul helper that writes fixed init-code hex to memory, calls create2(value, offset, length, salt), reverts on zero address, returns the deployed address word, records crosscall.invoke metadata, matches golden Yul, compiles with solc, and matches the expected CREATE2 address before calling the deployed runtime through Foundry.
lowerExpr delegates effects to lowerEffectExpr; scalar word reads lower directly, scalar struct reads lower only in aggregate contexts, and statement-only or unsupported effects reject.

lowerEffectExpr emits sload(slot) for word scalars; whole scalar storage struct reads expand to per-field sload words in struct local bindings, struct returns, whole local struct assignment, and field access; Counter and EvmHashProbe cover U64 and Hash scalar reads, EvmTypedStorageProbe covers Bool scalar reads, EvmStorageStructProbe covers flat scalar struct reads, and diagnostics cover statement misuse.

lowerEffectStmt emits sstore(slot, value) for word scalars and expands whole flat scalar storage struct writes into per-field sstore operations with RHS snapshotting; Counter and EvmHashProbe cover U64 and Hash scalar writes, EvmTypedStorageProbe covers Bool scalar writes, EvmStorageStructProbe covers flat scalar struct writes, and diagnostics reject expression-position writes.
lowerEffectStmt emits sstore(slot, op(sload(slot), value)); EvmAssignOpProbe validates all AssignOp variants on U64 scalar storage and diagnostics reject expression-position or non-numeric use.

lowerEffectExpr emits a bool read from ProofForge-managed map presence slots; EvmMapProbe validates U64 contains semantics including zero-valued present keys and raw presence slots, EvmTypedMapProbe validates U32, Bool, and Hash key presence, and diagnostics reject statement-position contains.
lowerEffectExpr emits sload(__proof_forge_map_slot(slot, key)); EvmMapProbe validates U64 ABI reads and raw Foundry vm.load slots, and EvmTypedMapProbe validates U32, Bool, and Hash map reads.

lowerEffectExpr emits __proof_forge_map_set_return and statement position emits __proof_forge_map_write; both helpers write the value slot and ProofForge-managed presence slot; EvmMapProbe validates U64 previous-value returns, writes, and presence slots, and EvmTypedMapProbe validates U32 insert semantics.

lowerEffectExpr emits __proof_forge_map_set_return and statement position emits __proof_forge_map_write; both helpers write the value slot and ProofForge-managed presence slot; EvmMapProbe validates U64 previous-value returns, Unit set dispatch, writes, and presence slots, and EvmTypedMapProbe validates U32, Bool, and Hash set semantics.

EvmStorageArrayProbe validates storage.array.read lowering to guarded sload(add(baseSlot,index)) over U64 storage arrays, including reads feeding fixed-array ABI return data; EventProbe validates reads feeding scalar fixed-array event data and indexed topic hashing; EvmTypedStorageProbe validates U32, Bool, and Hash storage-array reads, including out-of-bounds reverts.

EvmStorageArrayProbe validates storage.array.write lowering to guarded sstore(add(baseSlot,index),value) over U64 storage arrays; EvmTypedStorageProbe validates U32, Bool, and Hash storage-array writes, raw slot updates, and U32 write range guards.

EvmStorageStructProbe validates storage.array.struct.field.read lowering to guarded sload(base + index * field_count + field_offset) over fixed storage arrays of flat structs, including reads feeding fixed-array-of-struct ABI return data; EventProbe validates reads feeding fixed-array-of-flat-struct event data and indexed topic hashing.
EvmStorageStructProbe validates storage.array.struct.field.write lowering to guarded sstore(base + index * field_count + field_offset, value) over fixed storage arrays of flat structs.
EvmStorageStructProbe validates storage.struct.field.read lowering to sload(base + field_offset) for flat scalar storage structs.
EvmStorageStructProbe validates storage.struct.field.write lowering to sstore(base + field_offset, value) for flat scalar storage structs.

EvmMapProbe validates single-segment and nested consecutive-mapKey path reads over Map<U64, U64, N>; EvmTypedMapProbe validates mapKey path reads over U32, Bool, and Hash word maps plus U32 nested mapKey reads; EvmStorageArrayProbe validates single-segment index path reads over U64 storage arrays; EvmTypedStorageProbe validates index path reads over U32, Bool, and Hash storage arrays; EvmStorageStructProbe validates field paths over scalar storage structs and index+field paths over fixed storage arrays of structs.

EvmMapProbe validates single-segment and nested consecutive-mapKey path writes over Map<U64, U64, N>; EvmTypedMapProbe validates mapKey path writes over U32 and Bool word maps plus U32 nested mapKey writes; EvmStorageArrayProbe validates single-segment index path writes over U64 storage arrays; EvmTypedStorageProbe validates index path writes over U32, Bool, and Hash storage arrays; EvmStorageStructProbe validates field paths over scalar storage structs and index+field paths over fixed storage arrays of structs.

EvmMapProbe validates single-segment and nested consecutive-mapKey path compound assignment over Map<U64, U64, N>; EvmTypedMapProbe validates numeric mapKey path compound assignment over U32 maps plus U32 nested mapKey compound assignment; EvmStorageArrayProbe validates index path compound assignment over U64 storage arrays; EvmTypedStorageProbe validates numeric index path compound assignment over U32 storage arrays; EvmStorageStructProbe validates numeric field path compound assignment over scalar storage structs and fixed storage arrays of structs.
lowerEffectExpr emits EVM context opcodes for expression-position context reads; diagnostics still reject statement-position context reads.

EventProbe validates eventEmit lowering to Yul log1 with topic0 = keccak256(Solidity-style event signature), U64/Bool/U32/Hash scalar 32-byte word data, flat struct data flattened to declaration-ordered words from local values and storage scalar struct reads, scalar fixed-array data flattened to element words from local values and storage array reads, fixed arrays of flat structs flattened to element-field words from local literals and storage array struct field reads, and nested fixed arrays with scalar or flat-struct leaves recursively flattened to ABI-style data words; diagnostics reject expression-position events and malformed names.

EventProbe validates indexed event lowering to Yul log2/log3/log4 with topic0 = keccak256(Solidity-style event signature), one to three scalar indexed topics over U64/Bool/U32/Hash values, flat struct indexed topics hashed from ABI-style words from local values and storage scalar struct reads, scalar fixed-array indexed topics hashed from ABI-style words from local values and storage array reads, fixed-array-of-flat-struct indexed topics hashed from ABI-style words from local literals and storage array struct field reads, nested fixed-array indexed topics with scalar or flat-struct leaves hashed from recursively flattened ABI-style words, and scalar/aggregate non-indexed data words; diagnostics reject expression-position indexed events, more than 3 indexed fields, and unsupported aggregate indexed shapes.
EvmStorageStructProbe validates field as a scalar storage-struct path segment and as the second segment after index for fixed storage arrays of structs.

EvmStorageArrayProbe validates index as the first and only storage-path segment for EVM U64 fixed storage-array reads, writes, and compound assignment; EvmTypedStorageProbe validates index paths over U32, Bool, and Hash fixed storage arrays; EvmStorageStructProbe validates index as the first segment before field for fixed storage arrays of structs.

EvmMapProbe validates mapKey as a single segment and as consecutive nested mapKey segments for EVM Map<U64, U64, N> reads, writes, and compound assignment; EvmTypedMapProbe validates mapKey over U32, Bool, and Hash word maps plus consecutive nested U32 mapKey segments.

EvmExpressionProbe validates immutable scalar U32/U64/Bool let bindings; EvmHashProbe validates Hash let bindings; EvmArrayValueProbe, EvmStructValueProbe, and EvmStructArrayValueProbe validate aggregate let binding expansion, including nested local fixed arrays with scalar or flat-struct leaves; diagnostics reject unsupported types.

AssignmentProbe validates mutable scalar Yul let bindings for U64 and Bool locals; EvmAssignOpProbe validates mutable U32/U64 locals consumed by compound assignments; EvmArrayValueProbe, EvmStructValueProbe, and EvmStructArrayValueProbe validate mutable aggregate local expansion, including nested local fixed arrays with scalar or flat-struct leaves.

AssignmentProbe validates Yul assignment for mutable scalar local targets; EvmArrayValueProbe validates mutable local fixed-array element assignment, static and dynamic nested local fixed-array leaf assignment, whole fixed-array local assignment, and nested whole fixed-array local assignment with RHS snapshotting; EvmStructValueProbe validates mutable local struct field assignment and whole struct local assignment with RHS snapshotting; EvmStructArrayValueProbe validates mutable struct field assignment inside local fixed arrays and nested local fixed arrays with static and dynamic indexes plus whole struct-array local assignment with RHS snapshotting; diagnostics reject invalid targets and immutable locals.

lowerStatement emits Yul assignments for mutable local scalar, fixed-array element, static and dynamic nested fixed-array leaf, struct field, and struct-array field compound assignment, including nested fixed-array flat-struct field compound assignment; EvmAssignOpProbe validates all AssignOp variants for scalar locals and EvmArrayValueProbe/EvmStructValueProbe/EvmStructArrayValueProbe validate aggregate numeric field/element compound assignment; diagnostics reject invalid targets, immutable locals, and non-numeric operands.
lowerStatement delegates effects to lowerEffectStmt; scalar writes lower and unsupported effects reject.
AssertProbe and EvmExpressionProbe validate Yul if iszero(condition) revert guards through passing paths and Foundry revert behavior.
AssertProbe and EvmExpressionProbe validate Yul if iszero(eq(lhs, rhs)) revert guards through passing paths and Foundry revert behavior.
ConditionalProbe validates Yul switch/case/default lowering for if/else through then/else storage updates; EvmLoopProbe validates branch-local early returns through Yul leave.
EvmLoopProbe validates boundedFor lowering to Yul for loops with scalar storage updates and loop-local early returns through Yul leave; diagnostics reject invalid loop ranges.
IR EVM v0 rejects release statements with an explicit diagnostic; release is currently only lowered by EmitWat allocator-aware paths.

EvmExpressionProbe validates one-word scalar return assignment and dispatch encoding; EvmAbiAggregateProbe validates multi-word flat struct/fixed-array returns including Hash/bytes32 aggregate leaves plus nested scalar fixed-array returns; EvmStorageArrayProbe and EvmStorageStructProbe validate storage-backed aggregate ABI returns; EvmLoopProbe validates nested return lowering with Yul leave and non-final top-level return path analysis.
